riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)

causalAutopsy.notes: Not a regression. SessionRecovery's context-exhaustion handler shipped with only the destructive kill+respawn path and never had a /compact escalation — a latent gap from its introduction. It became user-visible now because sessions are running long enough to hit the hard context wall, and the same-day false-death-flood fixes (deferral + #935) surfaced that the destructive path had effectively never fired (all detections deferred). Grounded in 2026-06-06 logs: 0 real recoveries, all deferred.
